description: Expected simulation results for land-atmosphere hydrology coupling end-to-end test

couple2_atmosphere_surface.energy_closure: Surface energy balance: Rn = H + LE + G (within 5% residual)
couple2_atmosphere_surface.feedback_strength: Strong coupling during daytime, weaker at night

couple2_surface_soil.heat_transfer: Ground heat flux G couples surface and soil layer 1
couple2_surface_soil.thermal_inertia: Soil provides thermal memory, dampens temperature oscillations

couple2_vegetation_soil.water_coupling: Root water uptake from soil layer 2 (main rooting zone)
couple2_vegetation_soil.feedback_mechanism: Soil moisture → water stress → photosynthesis → transpiration
couple2_vegetation_soil.allocation_coupling: Root biomass affects water uptake capacity

land_surface_operators: LandSurfaceAlbedo: Vegetation and soil moisture dependent albedo

hydrological_callbacks: SeasonalPhenology: Control growing degree day phenology

water_balance_closure.soil_water: Infiltration - drainage - root uptake = storage change

cross_system_variable_flow.description: Multi-directional variable flow between land-atmosphere components

hydrological_forcing.precipitation: Primary water input to soil system

water_flux.evapotranspiration: Combined soil evaporation and plant transpiration
water_flux.surface_runoff: Excess water when infiltration capacity exceeded

water_supply.root_zone_availability: Weighted average of soil layers by root density

thermal_effects.soil_temperature: Affects root respiration and uptake rates
thermal_effects.thermal_buffering: Soil thermal mass stabilizes root zone temperature

biophysical_effects.radiation_interception: LAI controls radiation penetration to soil

hydrological_effects.transpiration_pathway: Major pathway for water loss from soil
hydrological_effects.canopy_energy_partitioning: Latent heat dominates over sensible heat
hydrological_effects.root_water_uptake: Active water extraction from multiple soil layers

expected_simulation_results.description: Expected numerical results for 1-year land-atmosphere simulation

seasonal_cycles.description: Expected seasonal variations in land-atmosphere system

diurnal_cycles.description: Expected daily cycles in energy and water fluxes

spatial_patterns.description: Expected biogeographical and climatic spatial patterns

latitudinal_gradients.tropical_regions: High LAI (>5), high ET (>3 mm/day), minimal seasonality
latitudinal_gradients.temperate_regions: Moderate LAI (2-6 seasonal), strong seasonal ET variation
latitudinal_gradients.boreal_regions: Low LAI (<3), short growing season, snow effects
latitudinal_gradients.arctic_regions: Very low LAI (<1), permafrost effects, extreme seasonality

continental_effects.desert_regions: High sensible heat, minimal latent heat, low biomass

drought_stress_events.trigger_frequency: 1-3 times per year in semi-arid regions

soil_saturation_events.duration: Minutes to hours depending on drainage rate

seasonal_senescence.LAI_reduction: From peak summer values to winter minimum

process_interactions.description: Key land-atmosphere process interactions and feedbacks

soil_moisture_feedback.mechanism: Soil moisture → water stress → transpiration → latent heat → air temperature
soil_moisture_feedback.positive_feedback: Dry soils → hot air → increased evaporation demand
soil_moisture_feedback.negative_feedback: Wet soils → increased transpiration → local cooling
soil_moisture_feedback.timescale: Hours to days for local effects

vegetation_albedo_feedback.mechanism: Vegetation growth → lower albedo → more energy absorption → higher growth
vegetation_albedo_feedback.seasonal_strength: Strong during growing season, weak in dormant season
vegetation_albedo_feedback.magnitude: Albedo change: 0.05-0.15 between vegetated and bare soil

phenology_temperature_feedback.mechanism: Temperature → phenology → LAI → transpiration → local cooling
phenology_temperature_feedback.spring_emergence: Earlier leaf-out with warming → enhanced cooling
phenology_temperature_feedback.autumn_senescence: Later senescence with warming → extended cooling

root_zone_coupling.mechanism: Root water uptake → soil moisture → plant water stress → allocation
root_zone_coupling.deep_rooting_advantage: Access to deeper, more stable water sources
root_zone_coupling.allocation_response: Increased root allocation under water stress

energy_balance_closure: Surface energy balance: |Rn - H - LE - G| < 10 W/m² daily mean
Bowen ratio validation: H/LE typical values 0.2-2.0 depending on climate
Diurnal energy cycle: Peak fluxes within 1-2 hours of expected timing
Seasonal energy range: Factor of 3-5 variation between summer and winter
water_balance_closure: Soil water balance: |P - ET - D - ΔS| < 0.5 mm/day residual
Evapotranspiration partitioning: Transpiration 60-90% of total ET
Runoff generation: Occurs when precipitation > infiltration capacity
Soil moisture memory: 1-3 month autocorrelation in root zone
vegetation_dynamics: Growing degree days: Phenology responds to temperature accumulation
LAI seasonal range: Factor of 2-6 variation between minimum and maximum
Biomass allocation: Root:shoot ratio 0.2-2.0 depending on water stress
Carbon balance: NPP = GPP - Respiration with realistic magnitudes
process_coupling: Stomatal conductance: Responds to light, humidity, soil moisture, CO2
Soil thermal properties: Vary with moisture content (factor of 2-3)
Surface roughness: Increases with vegetation height and density
Albedo dependence: Function of LAI, biomass, and soil moisture

performance_benchmarks.description: Expected computational performance for land surface model

julia_mtk.solver_efficiency: Operator splitting reduces stiffness, improves performance

python_scipy.jacobian_structure: Block diagonal structure due to spatial locality

energy_fluxes.note: Energy flux units in W/m², looser tolerances for smaller fluxes

hydrological_variables.note: Moisture units: m³/m³ for soil, kg/kg for air, mm/day for fluxes

vegetation_variables.note: Vegetation variables have higher uncertainty, allow larger tolerances
